chunks.text: Technical Reports - Ernest S. Kuh. An Assume-Guarantee Rule for Checking Simulation for Multipoint Moment Matching of Multiport Distributed Interconnect Networks (M99/13) by Thomas A. Henzinger, S. Qadeer, S.K. Rajamani, S. Tasiran, J.M.L. Wang and Ernest S. Kuh. Passive Model Order Reduction Algorithm for Multipoint Moment Matching of Multiport Distributed Interconnect Networks (M98/13) by Q. Yu, J.M.L. Wang and Ernest S. Kuh. Reduced Order Model of Transmission Lines by Multiple Points Moment Matching and Passivity Preservation (M97/70) by Q. Yu and Ernest S. Kuh. Post Global Routing Crosstalk Risk Estimation and Reduction (M96/13) by T. Xue, Ernest S. Kuh and D. Wang.
chunks.question: What are the titles of the technical reports by Ernest S. Kuh from 1999 to 1996?
chunks.answer: Four reports on simulation and interconnect networks.

chunks.text: An Interactive Floorplanner for Design Space Exploration (M96/4) by H. Esbensen and Ernest S. Kuh. Design Space Exploration for Building- Block Placements (M95/84) by H. Esbensen and Ernest S. Kuh. SYMPHONY: An Efficient Mixed Signal Circuit Simulator (M95/24) by P. Buch and Ernest S. Kuh. An IC/MCM Timing-Driven Placement Algorithm Featuring Explicit Design Space Exploration (M95/20) by H. Esbensen and Ernest S. Kuh. An Accurate Time Domain Interconnect Model of Transmission Line Networks (M95/10) by Q. Yu and Ernest S. Kuh.
chunks.question: What topics do the 1995-1996 technical reports by Ernest S. Kuh cover?
chunks.answer: Floorplanning, circuit simulation, and interconnect modeling.

chunks.text: Techniques for Fast Circuit Simulation Applied to Power Estimation of CMOS Circuits (M94/98) by P. Buch, S. Lin, V. Nagasamy and Ernest S. Kuh. New Approaches for On-Chip Power Switching Noise Reduction (M94/94) by C. Hough, T. Xue and Ernest S. Kuh. Moment Matching Model of Transmission Lines and Application to Interconnect Delay Estimation (M94/20) by Q. Yu and Ernest S. Kuh. Performance-Oriented Fully Routable Dynamic Architecture for a Field Programmable Logic Device (M93/42) by N.B. Bhat, K. Chaudhary and Ernest S. Kuh.
chunks.question: What are the key areas in the 1994-1993 technical reports?
chunks.answer: Circuit simulation, power noise, and FPGA architecture.

chunks.text: Quadratic Boolean Programming for Performance-Driven System Partitioning (M93/19) by M. Shih and Ernest S. Kuh. Integer Programming Techniques for Multiway System Partitioning Under Timing and Capacity Constraints (M92/81) by M. Shih, Ernest S. Kuh and R-S. Tsay. RITUAL: A Performance Driven Placement Algorithm (M91/103) by A. Srinivasan, K. Chaudhary and Ernest S. Kuh. RITUAL An Algorithm for Performance-Driven Placement of Cell-Based ICs (M91/47) by A. Srinivasan, K. Chaudhary and Ernest S. Kuh.
chunks.question: What optimization methods are used in the 1993-1991 reports?
chunks.answer: Boolean and integer programming for partitioning.

chunks.text: Novel Routing Schemes for IC Layout Part II: Three-Layer Channel Routing (M90/102) by D. Wang and Ernest S. Kuh. Novel Routing Schemes for IC Layout Part I: Two-Layer Channel Routing (M90/101) by D. Wang and Ernest S. Kuh. A Novel Approach to IC Performance Optimization by Clock Routing (M90/27) by M.A.B. Jackson, A. Srinivasan and Ernest S. Kuh. A Unified Approach to the Via Minimization Problem (M87/80) by X-M. Xiong and Ernest S. Kuh.
chunks.question: What routing techniques are discussed in the 1990 and 1987 reports?
chunks.answer: Channel routing and via minimization methods.

chunks.text: PROUD: A Fast Sea-of-Gates Placement Algorithm (M87/79) by R-S. Tsay, Ernest S. Kuh and C-P. Hsu. A Unified Approach to Circuit Partitioning and Placement (M86/8) by R-S. Tsay and Ernest S. Kuh. Building Block Layout: Routing Region Definition and Ordering Scheme (M85/14) by W.M. Dai, T. Asano and Ernest S. Kuh. BBL.2 User's Manual (M85/2) by N.-P. Chen, C.-C. Chen, C.-P. Hsu, H.H. Chen, Ernest S. Kuh and M. Marek-Sadowska.
chunks.question: What placement algorithms are described in the 1987-1985 reports?

chunks.text: RAMP: Gate-Array, Standard-Cell and Masterimage Placement Manual (M84/71) by C.K. Cheng and Ernest S. Kuh. BBL User's Manual (M83/68) by N-P. Chen, C-P. Hsu, H.H. Chen, Ernest S. Kuh and M. Marek-Sadowska. Module Placement Based on Resistive Network Optimization (M83/35) by C.K. Cheng and Ernest S. Kuh. An Efficient Single-Row Routing Algorithm (M83/34) by T. T-S. Tarng, M. Marek-Sadowska and Ernest S. Kuh. Berkeley Building-Block Layout System for VLSI Design (M83/10) by N.P. Chen, C.P. Hsu and Ernest S. Kuh.
chunks.question: What VLSI design tools are covered in the 1984-1983 reports?
chunks.answer: RAMP, BBL manuals, and routing algorithms.
